title: Scheduled Import from external source into Monday

posts.author: baruchm (Baruch Moroz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
Currently, the capability of importing data from Excel on a pre-defined schedule basis does not exists. User have to actively go to Monday and import the desired data.
In my mind, having this capability should be considered for Monday roadmap as a basic requirement.
While considering the above, the opposite capability of exporting data from Monday to Excel on user’s pre-defined schedule should also be taken into consideration.

Thanks,
Baruch
